joke:
Why don't skeletons fight each other?  

They don’t have the guts.

Why don't scientists trust atoms?  

Because they make up everything!

Why don't eggs tell secrets?  

They'd crack under pressure!

Why don't pirates ever get lost?  

Because they always follow their *arr*!

Why don't paper towels ever get invited to parties?  

Because they’re too *absorbent*—they just soak up all the fun!

Why don't bicycles ever fall over?  

Because they’re two-tired!

Why don't grapes ever get invited to therapy?  

Because they come in pairs and always bring their *bunch* of issues!

Why don't clouds ever get promoted at work?  

Because they’re always *overcast* and never pull their weight!

Why don't shadows ever get invited to dinner?  

Because they always show up but never bring anything to the table!

Why don't silence jokes ever get told?  

Because nobody likes a pause for too long!

Why don't umbrellas ever get invited to poker night?  

Because they always fold when things heat up!

Why don't mattresses ever get invited to arguments?  

Because they always take things lying down!

Why don't socks ever become comedians?  

Because they always get lost in the laundry and never make it to the punch line!

Why don't silence jokes work?  

Because I already tried that one and you didn’t laugh loud enough to confirm!

Why don't mirrors ever get invited to parties?  

Because they always reflect on the past and never live in the moment!

Why don't noses ever get invited to space?  

Because they always take up too much *air* and think everything’s a big deal!

Why don't bookmarks ever get invited to concerts?  

Because they always stay in the middle of the story and never reach the chorus!

Why don't traffic lights ever get invited to therapy?  

Because they’re stuck in a cycle of red, yellow, and *I can't talk right now*!

Why don't blank canvases ever get invited to parties?  

Because they’re great at starting conversations… but always leave things *unpainted*!

Why don't silence jokes ever work?  

Because by the time I tell one, you've already left the room!

Why don't voids ever get invited to dinner?  

Because they’re already full of nothing—and still ask if there’s room for dessert!

Why don't socks ever become politicians?  

Because they’d just end up in the same drawer as all the other missing promises!

Why don't headaches ever get invited to games?  

Because they always show up unannounced and ruin the fun—just like this joke!

Why don't unfinished jokes ever get told?  

Because by the time I start, you’ve already guessed the ending… and left!

Why don't empty chairs ever get promoted?  

Because they’re great at keeping a seat warm, but when it comes to standing up, they just… never rise to the occasion!

Why don't invisible men ever get cast in movies?  

Because no matter how hard they try, they just can’t seem to make a scene!

Why don't zero and one ever go on vacation?  

Because they’re already stuck in an endless loop of “yes” and “no”!

Why don't excuses ever get invited to debates?  

Because they’re always late, out of shape, and blame the last one!

Why don't questions ever get invited to the comedy club?  

Because they keep asking for punchlines… but never bring one themselves!

Why don't answers ever show up on time?  

Because they’re always stuck behind a wall of “I don’t knows” and bad Wi-Fi!
